docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, JOHN C. AS TO DEFENDANT PLAINFIELD, SAMUEL PURE LEGAL SOLUTIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
